meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no coding experience (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no coding experience. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Build SaaS Apps Without Coding Skills
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code and Antigravity to launch your SaaS. A high-level checklist for founders to overcome no-code limitations and ship production-ready AI apps.
content.answer_block: Overcoming the no-code barrier requires leveraging Claude Code as your lead engineer. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can transform high-level business requirements into production-grade codebases, effectively bypassing the need for manual programming while maintaining total control over your SaaS product architecture.
content.intro:
The gap between a million-dollar vision and a functional SaaS product is usually a wall of syntax errors and complex deployment pipelines. For the non-technical founder, this wall feels impenetrable, forcing reliance on expensive agencies or slow-moving freelancers. 

But the paradigm has shifted. With the synergy of Claude Code and Antigravity, you are no longer a spectator in your own product development. You are now the architect, directing an AI-powered engineering team that works at the speed of thought. This checklist is your blueprint to bridge the gap from concept to revenue.

steps.title: Establish the Architectural Foundation
steps.description: Before writing a single line of code, define your tech stack and directory structure to ensure scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Architect a scalable SaaS directory structure using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Define the core folder hierarchy and essential configuration files for a production-ready application.

steps.title: Define Your Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your unique value proposition into concrete functional requirements that the AI can interpret.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a comprehensive PRD for a subscription-based SaaS tool. Detail the user authentication flow, database schema for user profiles, and the core payment integration logic using Stripe.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the authentication logic based on the provided PRD'

steps.title: Iterative UI Construction
steps.description: Build the frontend incrementally, ensuring each component aligns with your brand identity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a high-converting landing page component library using Tailwind CSS. Focus on a Hero section, pricing cards, and a feature grid that emphasizes conversion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Create the Pricing component with responsive grid layout'

steps.title: API and Backend Orchestration
steps.description: Connect your frontend to backend services using secure API routes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write secure server-side API routes to handle user subscription status validation and database updates for the user profile.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create API route for subscription validation with error handling'

steps.title: Rigorous Quality Assurance
steps.description: Automate testing to ensure your application remains stable throughout the build process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests for the authentication and payment gateway modules using Jest and React Testing Library.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'context.md' file in your root directory; Claude Code uses this to understand your evolving business goals.
Use Antigravity to generate 'diffs' rather than full file rewrites to maintain version control integrity.
Request 'Chain-of-Thought' explanations from Claude before it commits code to ensure the logic matches your business model.
Prioritize 'Feature Flags' early, allowing you to deploy incomplete code without breaking the production user experience.
Debug by pasting terminal error logs directly into Claude Code; it is optimized to parse stack traces for immediate remediation.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is functional, deploy to Vercel and begin A/B testing your landing page copy to optimize for conversion before scaling your marketing efforts.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' time to hire a dev team. You have the vision and the tools; now you need the execution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
